inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 cash from operations $4,277.1M minus ~$200M capital spending, divided by ~359M diluted shares (10-K FY2025)
inputs.normalization_note: FY2025 mid-cycle base; Q1 2026 revenue and operating income run above trend and are not inflated into starting cash flow

bear.notes: Volume mean-reversion, regulatory fee pressure, lower exit multiple

base.notes: Mid-cycle owner cash; exit near current ~22x cash flow multiple

bull.notes: Sustained rates and volatility, event-contract and international volume tailwind

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Clearing balances are liabilities, not hidden NAV; equity $28.7B FY2025 10-K

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in cash path?
Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Investment securities marked in filings; not thesis driver

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: Regular dividend program; no dated legal recovery

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Crypto, event contracts, and international volume in transaction and clearing fees (10-K MD&A)

option_scan.question: Material separate option terminals required?
option_scan.evidence: Lawrence full cash-flow path sufficient after scan
